languages.text: "Покорять и властвовать. Мы — клинок, разящий слабых и недостойных".
"To conquer and dominate. We are the blade that cuts down the weak and unworthy."
languages.original_text: "Покорять и властвовать. Мы — клинок, разящий слабых и недостойных".

traits.locale_text: "To conquer and dominate. We are the blade that cuts down the weak and unworthy."
"To conquer and dominate. We are the blade that cuts down the weak and unworthy."
"To conquer and dominate. We are the blade that cuts down the weak and unworthy."

languages.text: 「我らは、弱くして無価値なる者どもを斬り伏せる刃なり」
languages.original_text: "To conquer and dominate. We are the blade that cuts down the weak and unworthy."

traits.locale_text: 「弱きを打ち砕き、不 worthyな者を支配する。我らは弱きを斬り、不 worthyな者を支配する刃なり。」

languages.text: “为了征服与统治。我们是斩杀弱者与不配之人的利刃。”
languages.original_text: "To conquer and dominate. We are the blade that cuts down the weak and unworthy."

traits.locale_text: “为了征服与统治。我们是斩杀弱者与不配之人的利刃。”

languages.text: «Conquistar y dominar. Somos la espada que ejecuta a los débiles y los indignos».
languages.original_text: "To conquer and dominate. We are the blade that cuts down the weak and unworthy."

traits.locale_text: «Conquistar y dominar. Somos la espada que ejecuta a los débiles y los indignos».

languages.text: "Nach Eroberung und Dominanz. Wir sind die Klinge, die die Schwachen und Unwürdigen niederstreckt."
languages.original_text: "To conquer and dominate. We are the blade that cuts down the weak and unworthy."

traits.locale_text: "Nach Eroberung und Dominanz. Wir sind die Klinge, die die Schwachen und Unwürdigen niederstreckt."

languages.text: « Conquérir et dominer. Nous sommes la lame qui pourfend les faibles et les indignes. »
languages.original_text: "To conquer and dominate. We are the blade that cuts down the weak and unworthy."

traits.locale_text: « Conquérir et dominer. Nous sommes la lame qui pourfend les faibles et les indignes. »

languages.text: "Fethetmek ve hükmetmek için. Biz zayıfları ve layık olmayanları kesip biçen kılıcız."
languages.original_text: "To conquer and dominate. We are the blade that cuts down the weak and unworthy."

traits.locale_text: "Fethetmek ve hükmetmek için. Biz zayıfları ve layık olmayanları kesip biçen kılıcız."
